isi.lyrics:
Lyric Rei - Get up

Romanization

Huh
Huh
Huh
Bang bang
Ahh

Get up next to me bae, get up next to me

Get up next to me bae
Beside you it’s a money bag
Post you on my Instagram
I let’em know you with the gang

I just wanna have your back
I spend it like it’s Onlyfans
Get up next to me bae
Beside you it’s a hunnit racks

Bring you in the afterparty
Ecstasy? Ok I got it
No one can judge you and me
Cuz they know we ‘bout it

I tell your last man I’m sorry
Nah you couldn’t get invited
Kick’em out the door we slidin’
But we don’t even get started

Ayy
I come inside at 8pm
Baby wonhaneun ge isseum naege yaegihae
They lined up till the sun rise up
We lined up sum party drugs and geeked up

Get up next to me bae
Beside you it’s a money bag
Post you on my Instagram
I let’em know you with the gang

I just wanna have your back
I spend it like it’s Onlyfans
Get up next to me bae
Beside you it’s a hunnit racks

Bring you in the afterparty
Ecstasy? Ok I got it
No one can judge you and me
Cuz they know we ‘bout it

I tell your last man I’m sorry
Nah you couldn’t get invited
Kick’em out the door we slidin’
But we don’t even get started

Ass up
Ass up
Don’t say sum
Ketchum

Hangeul

Huh
Huh

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Rei - PSM

Romanization

Syrup got me lay down on a bed
nan achimbuteo yakdeuri piryohae
Geeked up I been thinking about my past
Percocet helps dealing with this pain

Free all my bros
chaenggiji maneun don
Gotta put them on my folks
nan baesinhan jeok eopseo han beon do

I’m a Soundcloud greatest of all time
They still popping my shit it’s no lie
urin naeryeogatdagado olla
HELLKAT HELLKAT You know it’s for life

Got a tucked up glock, bitch you on sight
I’m back in this shit saranamasseo honja
Shout out my evil twin yeah we Offline
Come on

P-P-Pour some more
I need me a meds like I got a cold
Why you upset? Bitch you gotta slow-
Slow it down, drop’em on the floor

nae keobe gadeukhage ttarajwo
Uh, yeah, pour some more
I get high, but I keep it low
I been down but I’m about to glow

Pour some more

P-P-Pour some more

I get geeked up

Slow it down, drop’em on the floor

I’m a Soundcloud greatest of all time

P-P-Pour some

isi.lyrics:
Lyric JUNE - TO. YOU

Romanization

gin siganieotji
jeongmal oraemmaniya geuchi?
ssayeotdeon geotdeureun geudaero
i gyejeoreun tto doraogo

oraemmaniya geuchi?
seotun geulssi geudaero yeojeonhaji?
ajikdo tteollyeo nan
ontong nae haruga
neoro gadeukhaeseo

I got my days lost, you’re the way I feel
on geori, tongsin mabidoen geot gata
nae mam sok eojilleojin geobwa
naege
How to love to love
malhaejwo
Heart to love to love

I fall for you
malloneun pyohyeon andwae
I think of you (I think of you)
Said, I can be with you

ppeonhan yaegie
seotun geulssiro nulleodameun
nal anajullae

And it’s all about you
All these true words I’m sending just to you
neon nal mitgo ttarawajwo
U&I never fall apart

Umm
Tell me what to do
neoui harue mok maedalgu
nan gidarigiman haedo
useumi saeeo nawa
oh that’s true

I wanna hide inside your bag.
jinjja ne munja hantonge
mak eojireowo nae son jabajul nugungga piryohae what I need

I got my days lost, you’re the way I feel
on maeum kkeuti ttakkeumgeoryeo
ne yeope seol ttae
allyeojwo
How to love to love
malhaejwo
Heart to love to love

I fall for you
malloneun pyohyeon andwae
I think of you (I think of you)
Said, I can be with you

ppeonhan yaegie
seotun geulssiro nulleodameun
nal anajullae

And it’s all about you
All these true words I’m sending just to you
neon nal mitgo ttarawajwo
U&I never fall apart

U&I
U&I Forever
U&I
We’ll never fall apart

Hangeul

긴 시간이었지
정말 오랜만이야 그치?
쌓였던 것들은 그대로
이 계절은 또 돌아오고

오랜만이야 그치?
서툰 글씨 그대로 여전하지?
아직도 떨려 난
온통 내 하루가
너로 가득해서

I got my days lost, you’re the way I feel
온 거리, 통신 마비된 것 같아
내 맘 속 어질러진 거봐
내게
How to love to love
말해줘
Heart to love to love

I fall for you
말로는 표현 안돼
I think of you (I think of you)
Said, I can be with you

뻔한 얘기에
서툰 글씨로 눌러담은
날 안아줄래

And it’s all about you
All these true words I’m sending just to you
넌 날 믿고 따라와줘
U&I never fall apart

Umm
Tell me what to do
너의 하루에 목 매달구
난 기다리기만 해도
웃음이 새어 나와
oh that’s true

I wanna hide inside your bag.
진짜 네 문자 한통에
막 어지러워 내 손 잡아줄 누군가 필요해 what I need

I got my days lost, you’re the way I feel
온 마음 끝이 따끔거려
네 옆에 설 때
알려줘

날 안아줄래

And it’s all about you
All these true words I’m sending just to you

U&I never fall apart

U&I

U&I

isi.fileNames: 세상의 끝이라도 (Even If the World Ends)
isi.driveFileNames: Kassy - 세상의 끝이라도 (Even If the World Ends).mp3
isi.albums: Even If the World Ends: A Single Message
isi.lyrics:
Lyric Kassy - 세상의 끝이라도 (Even If the World Ends)

Romanization

buseojyeodo joa nan gikkeoi padoga doelge
neoneun challaui bitcheoreom naege wajwo
eotteon baramedo ulji anneun goyoga doelge
eonjedeun nareul chajawa sumi dwaejulge

malhaji anado neukkyeo i numbit, ttatteutham
jamdeun maeumdeuri dasi pieona

neowa na, sesangui kkeutirado joa nan
neo hanaman, ttak hanaman haengbokhamyeon dwae
byeolbichi sarajin eodum sogeul hemaedo
neo hanaman nae gyeote isseojwo

machi yeongwonhal geotcheoreom nal barabwa jullae
eogimeopsi nae mameul jul tenikka

neowa na, sesangui kkeutirado joa nan
neo hanaman, ttak hanaman haengbokhamyeon dwae
byeolbichi sarajin eodum sogeul hemaedo
neo hanaman nae gyeote isseojwo

majimagieodo joa nal himkkeot anajwo
suthan bamui gin yeouni doelge ijen

neowa na, sesangui kkeutirado joa nan
kkamadeukhi kkaeji aneul kkumeul kkul teni
neol wihae geu eotteon geotdo da doel su isseo
jigeumcheoreom nae gyeote isseojwo

Hangeul

부서져도 좋아 난 기꺼이 파도가 될게
너는 찰나의 빛처럼 내게 와줘
어떤 바람에도 울지 않는 고요가 될게
언제든 나를 찾아와 숨이 돼줄게

말하지 않아도 느껴 이 눈빛, 따뜻함
잠든 마음들이 다시 피어나

너와 나, 세상의 끝이라도 좋아 난
너 하나만, 딱 하나만 행복하면 돼
별빛이 사라진 어둠 속을 헤매도
너 하나만 내 곁에 있어줘

마치 영원할 것처럼 날 바라봐 줄래
어김없이 내 맘을 줄 테니까

너와 나, 세상의 끝이라도 좋아 난
너 하나만, 딱 하나만 행복하면 돼
별빛이 사라진 어둠 속을 헤매도
너 하나만 내 곁에 있어줘

마지막이어도 좋아 날 힘껏 안아줘
숱한 밤의 긴 여운이 될게 이젠

너와 나, 세상의 끝이라도 좋아 난
까마득히 깨지 않을 꿈을 꿀 테니
널 위해 그 어떤 것도 다 될 수 있어
지금처럼 내 곁에 있어줘

isi.lyrics:
Lyric NIKA - Over The Wall (with sEODo)

Romanization

bul butyeojul saram eodi eomna
yaegi jom hage
waenji heotheothan i gibun
musidanghan seorum

You build your secrets like a fortress
And than you said I’ll make you mine
boiji anneun daemose
nan ajikdo bakhyeo sara

bamsae eoreobuteobeorin kkocheun
samageseo dasi pieona
I’ll not fall again
I’ll not fall into the game

deopigo deopin gasi sangcheo wie
hayan nabiya anjara
I’ll make it up someday
pi heullyeodo jeomanchi ttwieoga
baro geuge naui allibai
dabeun naega jeonghae Oh
sikkeureopge sabangi tteodeune
naman tto moreuge
maeil budithigo da tteutgigo
nal nollyeodaedo nan (gyesok ga)
Over the wall

numbusige taoreulkka geomna?
nega gonhi jal ttae
honja haenaebeorin jigeum
da bueobeoryeo gireum yeah

You’ve had your chance now let me go
sigani akkawo
I gave you all, I bled, I burned
And my time is when I say

ulgobulgo maedallyeodo sesangeun neol bwajuji ana
gijigael deo pige hwalhwal naraoreuge

deopigo deopin gasi sangcheo wie
hayan nabiya anjara
I’ll make it up someday
pi heullyeodo jeomanchi ttwieoga
baro geuge naui allibai
dabeun naega jeonghae Oh
sikkeureopge sabangi tteodeune
naman tto moreuge
maeil budithigo da tteutgigo
nal nollyeodaedo nan gyesok ga
Over the wall

Hangeul

불 붙여줄 사람 어디 없나
얘기 좀 하게
왠지 헛헛한 이 기분
무시당한 설움

You build your secrets like a fortress
And than you said I’ll make you mine
보이지 않는 대못에
난 아직도 박혀 살아

밤새 얼어붙어버린 꽃은
사막에서 다시 피어나
I’ll not fall again
I’ll not fall into the game

덮이고 덮인 가시 상처 위에
하얀 나비야 앉아라
I’ll make it up someday
피 흘려도 저만치 뛰어가
바로 그게 나의 알리바이
답은 내가 정해 Oh
시끄럽게 사방이 떠드네
나만 또 모르게
매일 부딪히고 다 뜯기고
날 놀려대도 난 (계속 가)
Over the wall

눈부시게 타오를까 겁나?
네가 곤히 잘 때
혼자 해내버린 지금
다 부어버려 기름 yeah

You’ve had your chance now let me go
시간이 아까워
I gave you all, I bled, I burned
And my time is when I say

기지갤 더 피게 활활 날아오르게
